episodes.title: Estranged Christian Parent escapes a cult! with guest Peter Young
episodes.description:
In this episode, we hear guest, Peter Young's story of marrying into a cult unknowingly and the nightmare that followed. Peter tells of the impact this has on his marriage, his children, and on the ongoing relationship with his oldest child. He tells us in this episode what could have prevented some of these problems, and how God was with Him in getting out. His faith is inspiring and it's an moving story.



In this episode I also talk about my course and Five-day challenge. I invite you to join me for this limited time opportunity. Five-days of daily one-on-one calls to work toward repairing your self-esteem and help you return to your identity as a daughter of God, not only in your mind, but in your heart. Find me at http://MaritWelker.com along with free downloads and information about my 90 course and coaching.
